code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      cur = 0
    else
      if in_num
        nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    nums = list.push(nums, sign * cur)
  end

  mut out = ""
  let total = nums.len()
  mut j = total - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
end
